paragraphs.body: I am from Barcelona and the buildings are big but not as big as those in the United States, so what I imagined when I arrived was to see buildings and constructions like skyscrapers.

And so it was, I arrived in Pittsburgh, and everything was huge. I was lucky that my whole family came and then we went to New York for a week to visit and there I was even more amazed. Everything was much higher there, more people, and I was also surprised by the dishes they serve and many other things.

As soon as we arrived in Pittsburgh, my family and I were curious to go up to the top floor of the Cathedral of Learning and the truth is that when you are up there you see almost the entire city of Pittsburgh and it is quite impressive.

I posted this photo of a potato omelet with tomato and bread because it is a very popular food in Spain, and it is something that I have a hard time finding here in the United States. I think that in the United States they could improve the food, I think there is too much fast food that is not healthy for the body. You only eat well if you go to good restaurants, but they are quite expensive.

Comparing Pittsburgh with Barcelona they have things in common, such as that they are two big and nice cities to visit as a tourist. They also have buildings that are similar but I find that they have many different things as well: The weather in winter is very different, in Barcelona it is sunny and in Pittsburgh it snows or rains almost every day, the language is also different, but I have been lucky to go to international schools since I was very young, so English has not been a problem for me. Also, as I said before the food is much nicer in Barcelona, and finally I think that people are sportier in Barcelona, it is also true that there are more facilities because there are many clubs. In my opinion I prefer Barcelona because I have everything there, but I do not complain about the life I am leading in Pittsburgh as a student-athlete, I am very lucky.

annotations.comment: 4 The outline looks nice! please make sure that you include four images in your rough draft and use the story arc to construct your story.
